pr.title: Record: 11L XSA-all + Full GPTQ + Selective Pruning (val_bpb=1.1154, 3-seed)

output.summary: Extends Parallel Muon stack by applying XSA on every layer and combining Full Hessian GPTQ with selective ±1 pruning for tighter quantized compression.
techniques: XSA on all 11 layers for early cross-position mixing
Full Hessian GPTQ int6 followed by selective ±1 magnitude pruning
Parallel Muon base stack with Parameter Banking, LeakyReLU(0.5)², SmearGate, and U-Net skips
